privileged_info_summary: All metadata values have been independently verified through code analysis. The task creates a Phantom Kit (Bill of Materials) named 'Streamer Starter Kit' containing exactly three components: 'USB Microphone' (price $120), '10-inch Ring Light' (price $45), and 'Pop-up Green Screen' (price $80). The customer is 'Azure Interior', which is created during setup if not present. All data is synthetic and created programmatically via Odoo XML-RPC API in the 'odoo_demo' database with demo data enabled.
